# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.

Prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
  location: '<location>' # e.g., westeurope, northeurope etc...
  accountNamePrefix: '<account_name_prefix>'  
resources:
- name: storageAccount
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  properties:
    accountType: StandardLRS
    location: ${parameters('location')} # e.g., westeurope, northeurope etc...    
      
- name: blobContainerStaticWebsite  
  type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/containers'          
  dependsOn: storageAccount        
  properties:   
      publicAccess: "None" # set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication    
parameters:      
- name: location         
  type: string           
  defaultValue: 'westeurope'            
  
- name: accountNamePrefix          
  type: string             
  defaultValue: ''    # e.g., mystorageaccountprefix, mystorageaccname etc...
